keys.description: Full active-group list for one tenant (all organizations + sport_keys). Read by the tenant admin UI + by the age-group-picker widget. Small payload (id, name, slug, sport_key, min_age, max_age, cutoff_date_kind, is_default, is_seeded, sort_order, color).

Catalog rollup keyed by (tenant, organization, sport_key). Used by the picker widget to filter to the caller's scoping context. `organization_id` uses the literal `_` for null (tenant-wide); `sport_key` uses `_` for null (generic).
The is_default=true row for one (tenant, organization, sport_key) tuple. Read on every eligibility resolution when the resolver falls back to the default. Same null-encoding as `age:catalog:*`.
Cached resolver answer for a (DOB, sport_key, organization_id) triple against the tenant's catalog. Short TTL because rolling_from_birthday cutoffs shift as the calendar rolls.
invalidatedBy: AgeGroupObserver.updated (any resolution-relevant field: min_age, max_age, cutoff_*, sport_key, gender_category, is_default)

keys.description: One AgeGroup row. Read by every consumer that needs the full field set (bounds + cutoff config).

The parsed `data/default-age-groups.json` shipped catalog for a specific version. Static artifact — parsed once, cached indefinitely. Invalidated on deploy (the version suffix advances when the JSON file changes materially).
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcileAgeGroupDefaultInvariantJob run. Read by the health probe + the ops dashboard.

Aggregated inbound reference counts for one AgeGroup (Team + EventDivision + TeamRegistration). Read by the archive-preview UI + the observer's is_in_use check. Recomputed on every write to the referring tables.
